sections.paragraph:
(from the root יָסַד) only found in pl. מֹוסָדֹות Jer 51:26 constr. מֹוסְדֵי, מֹוסְדֹות.

(1) a founding, the act of laying a foundation, Isa 40:21.

(2) foundations, e.g. of a building, Jer 51:26 of the earth, Pro 8:29 of heaven, 2Sa 22:8. Hence buildings whose foundations alone remain, ruins, Isa 58:12.
